# Tekpair
> Web development, SEO optimization, business analytics, and managed IT for businesses.
Tekpair provides professional digital services for businesses in the Capital Region of New York and beyond. Core offerings include custom web development and design, search engine optimization, business analytics and reporting, monthly IT retainers, and digital marketing. They serve small and mid-size businesses looking for a reliable technology partner with transparent, project-based pricing.

## Core Services

-
[Tekpair - Web Design, SEO & IT Solutions](https://tekpair.com/): Professional web development, SEO, analytics, and managed IT for businesses.
-
[Web Design Services](https://tekpair.com/webdesign/): Custom web development and design with flat-rate pricing.

## Company Information

-
[About Tekpair](https://tekpair.com/about/): Meet the team behind Tekpair.

## Support & Resources

-
